title: How Poor Sleep Disrupts Hormone Balance in Women Over 40
author: Happy Aging Team
tags: sleep hormones, cortisol, estrogen sleep, women over 40, perimenopause sleep, hormone disruption
meta_description: Poor sleep raises cortisol and suppresses estrogen, progesterone, and growth hormone in women over 40. Learn the mechanism and a 5-step sleep-hormone protocol.
